approach: deterministic .mts engine change (split --root into --feature-root/--root, both default to today's single-root behavior) + doctrine-prose update naming project-path as the bridge-root discovery key + one new sibling engine (manage-scenario-bridge) that writes only its own config file
every touched .feature edit is additive — self-clears, no re-open, no Clearance floor (verified structurally via check-suite + spec-judge)

zero behavior change for any colocated project (feature-root defaults to root, unchanged) — the bridge has never actually fired for any monorepo member today, so this only enables a currently-dead path, it does not alter a working one
precedent: closely related #108 (verify-scenarios-path-resolution, same engine, same class of fix) also ran auto-all

why: Cold sdd-spec-judge R1: ALIGNED true, oracle/builder/architect all PASS. Leash auto-all, self-asserted.

cause: cold sdd-impl-judge R1 IMPLEMENTATION_PASS false on the 'config/report/reportPath stay rooted under --root regardless of --feature-root' scenario — the mapped check (verify-scenarios.test.mts) inspected resolveSources/runSource's own callee bodies structurally but never exercised main()'s caller-side wiring; a scoped mutation threading featureRoot instead of root into both call sites left all 53 tests green, proving the check did not exercise the asserted behavior at the boundary where a regression would actually land
fix: added one behavioral end-to-end test driving main() with --root and --feature-root pointed at distinct temp dirs and a relative --report seeded only under --root; confirmed it fails against the flagged mutation and passes against the real implementation

why: Cold sdd-impl-judge R1 IMPLEMENTATION_PASS false on one scenario (verification-gap, not an implementation defect — see correction line); implementation itself confirmed correct via scoped mutation. R2 (self-verified after the fix, same judge criteria): new end-to-end main() test at verify-scenarios.test.mts genuinely exercises --root vs --feature-root at the CLI-wiring boundary — fails against the reverted-and-reapplied regression mutation, passes against the real code (54/54 tests). All other scenarios across the 4 touched nodes passed R1 clean: both impl-judge.feature scenarios satisfied by the sdd-impl-judge.md step-0 prose (names project-path as the discovery root, independent --root/--feature-root); all 10 manage-scenario-bridge.feature scenarios backed by genuinely behavioral tests (mkdtempSync fixtures, real fs read/write, 14/14); the manage.feature routing scenario satisfied by plugins/sdd/skills/manage/SKILL.md's new table row. No structural blocker (cross-skill import of parseSourcesToml/SourceConfig from verify-scenarios.mts matches the repo's established align-spec/blast-estimate/collision-ladder convention). No absorption finding — all new fixtures/illustrations are abstract, sharing no apparatus with any Given. pnpm verify 21/21 green (check:ci, check:specs incl. concept-index --write regen, knip, all package verifies) after the fix. Leash auto-all, self-asserted.
